headline: Ingersoll Rand (IR) Stock Looks Fully Priced After A 65% Run
summary: Ingersoll Rand stock has delivered a solid 64.6% return over the past 5 years, yet today the valuation picture is mixed. The intrinsic value estimate from a Discounted Cash Flow (DCF) view suggests the shares are roughly in line with fair value, while market multiples lean toward the stock being priced on the rich side. That tension leaves investors weighing a history of long term gains against checks that do not flag the stock as a clear bargain. Over 5 years, Ingersoll Rand is up 64.6%,...
